name: 7-day-mobile-and-web-design
description: Codex-ready plugin for a seven-day mobile and web design workflow.

interface.shortDescription: A seven-day design sprint for mobile and web work.
interface.longDescription: Guides product and feature design from brief through handoff with explicit deliverables for both mobile and web surfaces.
defaultPrompt: Run a seven-day design sprint for this product idea.
Turn this feature request into a mobile and web design plan.
Prepare a structured design handoff for this flow.
